title: Faye Lau
summary: A Division Agent whose appearance in the early Division 2 recap demonstrates the restored SHD Network reconnecting Agents across the country.

claims.text: The official franchise recap identifies Faye Lau as an Agent.
Faye Lau is glimpsed in The Division 2 when restoration of the SHD Network reconnects Agents across the country.

paragraphs.text: This limited early-game appearance links the first game's New York operation to the nationwide network crisis that opens The Division 2.

verification.notes: This record intentionally stops at the early Division 2 network appearance; Faye Lau's later arc needs its own current-canon source pass.
